description:
2022 Bentley Continental GT, V8 4.0L, AWD, 542bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 679,000 or AED 10,638 / Month with 20% Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 65,709 KMs - Al Habtoor Bentley Warranty Until 31st January 2027 (Extendable) - Full Bentley Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Heated / Ventilated Seats - Heated Steering Wheel - Heated Mirrors - 22" Alloy Wheels - Lane Assist - Blind Spot Assist - Park Distance Control - Adaptive Cruise Control - Heads Up Display - 360 Camera - Soft Close Doors - Massage Seat Function - Ambient Lighting (7 Colour Options) - Alcantara / Leather Steering Wheel - Fixed Panoramic Roof - Nappa Leather Stitched Seats - Wired Apple Car Play - Bluetooth Connectivity - Voice Control - Auto Lights - Auto Wipers - Illuminated Bentley Logo - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Satellite Navigation - LED -Matrix Headlights with High Beam Assist
